ksa_text: Develop and maintain enterprise data and AI strategy, including multi-year vision articulation, strategic priority identification, investment prioritization, roadmap construction, and annual strategy refresh.

dcwf.top_element_label: Provide evaluation and feedback necessary for improving intelligence production, intelligence reporting, collection requirements, and operations.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of providers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-T-001 (LS, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4345 is insufficient to establish relevance to quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.435, eu_ai_act=0.434, nist_ai_rmf=0.433) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4345 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-T-001 (composite 0.4345) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4345 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Quantitative Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4345 is not a standard requirement for Quantitative Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4345, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
